testcase.name: test_qnap_smart_error_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected QNAP SMART ERROR alert, got: [] assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vendor_specific_alerts.py:550: in test_qnap_smart_error_alert assert len(error_alerts) > 0, f"Expected QNAP SMART ERROR alert, got: {alerts}" E AssertionError: Expected QNAP SMART ERROR alert, got: [] E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_qnap_smart_warning_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected QNAP SMART WARNING alert, got: [] assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vendor_specific_alerts.py:569: in test_qnap_smart_warning_alert assert len(warning_alerts) > 0, f"Expected QNAP SMART WARNING alert, got: {alerts}" E AssertionError: Expected QNAP SMART WARNING alert, got: [] E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_zyxel_cpu_critical_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected Zyxel CPU alert, got: [] assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vendor_specific_alerts.py:595: in test_zyxel_cpu_critical_alert assert len(alerts) > 0, f"Expected Zyxel CPU alert, got: {alerts}" E AssertionError: Expected Zyxel CPU alert, got: [] E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_vendor_details_returns_vendor_metrics
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vendor_specific_alerts.py:631: in test_vendor_details_returns_vendor_metrics assert resp.status_code == 200, f"vendor-details failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: vendor-details failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_devices_endpoint_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vendor_specific_alerts.py:702: in test_devices_endpoint_works assert resp.status_code == 200, f"devices endpoint failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: devices endpoint failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
